commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Therefore now shall they go captive with the first that go captive, and the banquet of them that stretched themselves shall be removed. Hebrew, "the feast of those who stretch themselves out, shall "Septuagint, "the neighing shall be removed from Ephraim. "His lusts shall be punished, Jeremias v. Some translate Hebrew, "the mourning of those who stretch themselves on their beds is at hand. "Others, "their funeral feast is distant. "None shall bewail their death. So ambiguous is the original.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
